features: INSTANTLY CONCEALS THIN HAIRLINE AND COVERS GRAY ROOTS: The THICK FIBER Root Touch Up Powder is your secret weapon for effortlessly concealing thin hairlines and those unwelcome gray roots. With a few quick strokes, watch as the hair concealer powder works its magic, providing you with instant coverage that camouflages imperfections and boosts your hairline's fullness.

COMPLETE SET FOR EASY APPLICATION: Unlike other thinning hair products, we've made achieving perfect hair a breeze with our comprehensive Root Touch Up Powder set. Included in the root touch up powder to cover grey hair package are a handy puff, a convenient mirror, and a precision brush. These hair loss powder tools ensure that you can effortlessly apply the root cover up powder, making touch-ups a breeze.

WATER AND SWEAT RESISTANT: Our root cover up hair mascara is designed to withstand any weather conditions including wind and rain. Just use our hair line shadow powder and feel confident whether you're facing a rainy day or an active workout – your flawless look stays intact. Note, a tiny bit of hair spray is recommended, once applied donot touch even if it rains, it will stay firm and last until hair is washed with a shampoo

NATURAL, FULLER, MORE VIBRANT HAIRLINE: We understand the importance of having a head-turning, vibrant mane. The hair fibers for thinning hair for women and men not only offer instant coverage but also revitalize your hairline, leaving you with a naturally fuller and more radiant look. Embrace your beauty with confidence

QUALITY YOU CAN TRUST: THICK FIBER only uses natural hair fibers that are anti-itch, wind, weather, and sweat resistant. Not only that but with over 200 educational YouTube videos and over 150k subscribers, we are here to support you to successfully use our thin hair products daily and skyrocket your confidence that was unjustly destroyed by thinning hair.
description: Product Description How to Get the Look Why You'll Love It All-in-One with puff, brush & mirror for easy use. Instantly conceals thin hairlines & grays. Water/sweat resistant for lasting wear. Smooth, salon-quality finish. Covers bald spots. Compact for travel. Find Your Perfect Match No matter if your hair is dark, light, warm, or cool-toned, THICK FIBER Root Touch Up Powder has versatile shades that blend seamlessly with roots for a flawless, natural finish - so you can touch up confidently and look your best. Makes Thinning Hair Thicker Our blendable formula clings to existing strands and scalp, instantly giving the appearance of thicker, more voluminous hair. Blends Grays Like Magic No more rushing to the salon - our powder covers gray roots effortlessly, giving you a refreshed, youthful look in seconds. Refreshes Root Color Instantly The powder instantly revives your hair color, giving your roots a freshly touched-up look between salon visits. Lasts Until Your Next Wash Stays put throughout the day - sweat-proof and transfer-resistant for reliable coverage. Easy, Mess-Free Application The precision brush allows smooth, targeted application without fallout, ensuring neat coverage every time. Natural-Looking Finish Root Touch Up Powder Designed to seamlessly match your hair shade, the powder blends in for an undetectable, natural look. Perfect for Men and Women A versatile formula designed for all hair types, delivering seamless coverage for both men and women. Covers Hairline Flawlessly Easily fills in sparse edges and hairlines, creating a fuller, well-defined look in seconds. Trusted by Millions With 200M+ views on YouTube & Instagram, THICK FIBER is loved by men and women of all hair types. Made with natural ingredients, it delivers real, visible results - backed by our no-questions-asked policy, so your confidence is always protected.
